task_completion.description: Create a new page in the EdrawMax document
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new page tab is visible at the bottom of the EdrawMax workspace, indicating a second page has been added to the document.
The newly created page tab at the bottom of the EdrawMax workspace is explicitly renamed to 'Notes'.

task_completion.description: Create a text box on the new page
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text box or text element is visible on the blank canvas of the 'Notes' page.

task_completion.description: Insert the required text into the text box
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'This diagram shows the standard flowchart process' is clearly visible inside the text box on the canvas.

The EdrawMax application title bar displays 'multipage_diagram.eddx', a 'Save As' dialog shows the file being saved to the '/home/ga/' directory with the correct name, or a terminal/file manager window confirms the new file exists.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Wondershare EdrawMax GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking on EdrawMax menus, page tabs, and using the text tool, rather than manipulating files purely via terminal.

integrity.description: Text was added as a genuine element within the diagram
integrity.visual_evidence: The text is rendered inside the EdrawMax canvas workspace, not typed into a separate text editor or overlaid using an external tool.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI document editing
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent did not use terminal commands like 'cp' or 'echo' to simply rename the file or spoof the document contents without using the EdrawMax application.
